blended.narrative: Mt. Ashland is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 6".
